Class DoublyLinkedSongList

java.lang.Object
DoublyLinkedSongList
public class DoublyLinkedSongList extends Object
DoublyLinkedSongList My doubly-linked list specialized for Song objects. C-level requirements I cover here: - addFirst / addLast - removeFirst / removeLast - get(int index) → returns the Song at that index - displayForward() / displayBackward() Extra helpers I use for the GUI and playlist features: - size(), isEmpty(), clear() - nodeAt(int) for jumping directly to a node (efficient traversal) - removeAt(int) and addAt(int, Song) for indexed edits

  • Constructor Details

    • DoublyLinkedSongList

      public DoublyLinkedSongList()

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns:
      true if there are no songs in the list

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns:
      how many songs are stored

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Remove all nodes (constant-time reset of the list).

    • getHeadNode

      public DoublyLinkedSongNode getHeadNode()
      Returns:
      direct access to the head node (used by playlist wrapper / GUI)

    • getTailNode

      public DoublyLinkedSongNode getTailNode()
      Returns:
      direct access to the tail node (used by playlist wrapper / GUI)

    • addFirst

      public void addFirst(Song song)
      Add a song at the front of the list. Handles the empty-list case by making head and tail the same node.

    • addLast

      public void addLast(Song song)
      Add a song at the end of the list. Handles the empty-list case by making head and tail the same node.

    • removeFirst

      public Song removeFirst()
      Remove and return the first song.
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the list is empty

    • removeLast

      public Song removeLast()
      Remove and return the last song.
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the list is empty

    • get

      public Song get(int index)
      Returns the Song at index (0-based). Throws if out of bounds.

    • indexOf

      public int indexOf(Song song)
      Find the first index of a Song by equality.
      Parameters:
      song - the Song to look for
      Returns:
      index if found, -1 otherwise

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Song song)
      Returns:
      true if the list contains the given Song by equality.

    • removeAt

      public Song removeAt(int index)
      Remove and return the Song at a specific index. This is used by the GUI "Remove selected" action.

    • addAt

      public void addAt(int index, Song s)
      Insert a Song at a specific index. - index == 0 → addFirst - index == size → addLast (append) - otherwise splice between prev and current

    • nodeAt

      public DoublyLinkedSongNode nodeAt(int index)
      Return the internal node at index. I traverse from the head here; if needed I could optimize to choose head/tail based on which side is closer (bidirectional traversal).

    • displayForward

      public void displayForward()
      Print the list from head → tail with indices and basic song info.

    • displayBackward

      public void displayBackward()
      Print the list from tail → head with indices and basic song info.
